name: 3D Bubble Rush Game
description: 3D Bubble Rush is a fabulous casual game. If you are looking for a way to release your extra energy, if you want to express your masculinity in a way that is harmlessly violent, you might want to try this game. Waves upon waves of annoying enemies are approaching. You are supposed to fight your way through them by advancing courageously and forging valiantly ahead!
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
